metadata.name: hivemind
metadata.description: Hivemind Colony — multi-agent autonomous AI wallet on Solana

instructions.name: agent_pay
docs: Transfers `amount` lamports from one agent vault to another,
enforcing all spending rules and creating an immutable `TransactionLog`.
# Parameters
* `amount`  — Lamports to transfer.
* `task_id` — 32-byte SHA-256 hash of the task description string,
used to correlate payments with off-chain task records.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Transaction initiator — must be the colony authority.

accounts.name: colony
docs: Colony state — used to validate authority and increment tx counter.

accounts.name: from_agent
docs: Paying agent's state account.

accounts.name: vault_from
docs: Paying agent's vault — lamports deducted from here.

accounts.name: to_agent
docs: Receiving agent's state account.

accounts.name: vault_to
docs: Receiving agent's vault — lamports deposited here.

accounts.name: transaction_log
docs: Append-only log entry created for this payment.
Seeds = [b"log", colony.key(), total_transactions as le bytes].

instructions.name: emergency_freeze
docs: Freezes or unfreezes an agent.  A frozen agent cannot initiate payments.
Only callable by the colony authority.
# Parameters
* `freeze` — `true` to freeze; `false` to unfreeze.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Only the colony authority may freeze/unfreeze agents.

accounts.name: colony
docs: Colony state — authority is verified against this account.

accounts.name: agent
docs: The agent whose `is_frozen` flag will be toggled.

instructions.name: initialize_colony
docs: Creates the global colony PDA and seeds the treasury with 1 SOL.
Must be called exactly once by the deploying authority before any
agents are registered.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Colony authority — pays for account creation and seeds the treasury.

accounts.name: colony
docs: Global colony PDA.  Created here; seeds = [b"colony"].

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA — a system-owned account that holds reserve SOL.
Seeds = [b"treasury", colony.key()].
Its address is derived deterministically from the colony PDA, so
no additional data validation is required here.

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Registers a new agent in the colony, creates its vault PDA, and
funds the vault with 0.5 SOL from the colony treasury.
# Parameters
* `role`         — Functional role (`Scout = 0`, `Analyst = 1`, `Executor = 2`, `Ledger = 3`).
* `daily_limit`  — Maximum lamports spendable in a 24-hour window.
* `per_tx_limit` — Maximum lamports per single `agent_pay` call.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Only the colony authority can register new agents.

accounts.name: colony
docs: Colony global state — agent_count is incremented here.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA — source of the initial 0.5 SOL vault funding.

accounts.name: agent_state
docs: AgentState PDA — created here.
Seeds = [b"agent", colony.key(), agent_index].

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA — a system-owned SOL holder for this agent.
Seeds = [b"vault", agent_state.key()].
Access is controlled exclusively by on-chain PDA signing.

instructions.name: report_outcome
docs: Updates an agent's reputation and task counters after a task
completes.  Only callable by the colony authority.
# Parameters
* `success` — `true` if the task succeeded (+5 reputation), `false` if it failed (-10 reputation).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Only the colony authority can report outcomes.

accounts.name: colony
docs: Colony state — used to verify the reporting authority.

accounts.name: agent
docs: The agent whose reputation and task counters are updated.

errors.name: AgentFrozen
errors.msg: This agent has been frozen by the colony authority

errors.name: DailyLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Transaction would exceed agent's daily spending limit

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Agent vault does not have enough SOL

errors.name: UnauthorizedRole
errors.msg: This agent role cannot perform this action

errors.name: ColonyFull
errors.msg: Colony has reached maximum agent capacity (255)

errors.name: InvalidReputation
errors.msg: Reputation value is out of valid range

types.name: AgentFreezeEvent
docs: On-chain event emitted by `emergency_freeze` upon state change.

fields.name: agent_index
docs: Zero-based index of the agent that was frozen or unfrozen.

fields.name: frozen_by
docs: The authority that triggered this action.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when the freeze/unfreeze occurred.

fields.name: is_frozen
docs: New frozen state: `true` = frozen, `false` = active.

types.name: AgentPayEvent
docs: On-chain event broadcasted by `agent_pay` upon successful transfer.

fields.name: from
docs: Agent index of the payer.

fields.name: to
docs: Agent index of the recipient.

fields.name: amount
docs: Transfer amount in lamports.

fields.name: task_id
docs: SHA-256 hash of the task description (matches `TransactionLog.task_id`).

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when the transfer was executed.

fields.name: colony
docs: The colony this agent belongs to.

fields.name: agent_index
docs: Zero-based index assigned at registration time.

fields.name: role
docs: Functional role of this agent in the colony.

fields.name: vault
docs: The PDA vault that holds this agent's SOL balance.

fields.name: reputation
docs: Reputation score — starts at 100, range 0–1000.
Drops to 0 triggers automatic freeze.

fields.name: daily_limit
docs: Maximum lamports this agent can spend within a 24-hour window.

fields.name: per_tx_limit
docs: Maximum lamports allowed in a single `agent_pay` call.

fields.name: daily_spent
docs: Accumulated lamports spent in the current 24-hour window.

fields.name: last_reset
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) when `daily_spent` was last reset to 0.

fields.name: is_frozen
docs: If true this agent cannot send payments until unfrozen.

fields.name: total_tasks
docs: Total tasks assigned to this agent (success + failure combined).

fields.name: successful_tasks
docs: Tasks that completed with a `success == true` outcome report.

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical bump stored to avoid recomputation in CPIs.

fields.name: authority
docs: The wallet that deployed and governs this colony.

fields.name: agent_count
docs: Running count of registered agents (max 255 — u8 ceiling).

fields.name: treasury
docs: Pubkey of the colony treasury PDA that holds reserve SOL.

fields.name: total_transactions
docs: Cumulative number of agent-to-agent transactions ever executed.

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical bump stored to avoid recomputation in CPIs.

types.name: ReputationUpdateEvent
docs: On-chain event emitted by `report_outcome` after updating reputation.

fields.name: agent_index
docs: Zero-based index of the agent whose reputation changed.

fields.name: old_reputation
docs: Reputation score before this update.

fields.name: new_reputation
docs: Reputation score after this update.

fields.name: success
docs: Whether the task was reported as successful.

fields.name: colony
docs: The colony this log entry belongs to.

fields.name: from_agent
docs: `agent_index` of the paying agent.

fields.name: to_agent
docs: `agent_index` of the receiving agent.

fields.name: amount
docs: Transfer amount in lamports.

fields.name: task_id
docs: SHA-256 hash of the task description string (32 bytes).

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when this transaction was recorded.

fields.name: success
docs: Whether the downstream task was reported as successful.

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical bump stored to avoid recomputation.
